name: Detect suspicious dependency typo in package.json

replay_ai_responses.package.json:
⚠️ [MEDIUM] [Line 5] The dependency name looks incorrect and may fail at install time.

```suggestion
    "lucide-react": "^0.1.0",
```

expected_findings.message: Suspicious dependency name "luide-react". This looks like a typo for "lucide-react".
